title: Fix array reduction in constraints crashing with class inheritance (#7226)

features.name: array reduction method in constraint with class inheritance
features.description: Code should include a class that extends another class, where the derived class has a constraint using an array reduction method like .sum() on a dynamic array

features.name: randomization of derived class with dynamic array constraint
features.description: Code should include a derived class with rand dynamic array, constraints on array size and array reduction methods, and a randomize() call on the derived class instance
